highlights.text: 05 Nights luxury villa stay in Ubud rainforest
Floral bath welcome & romantic starlit dinners
Couple's spa, cooking class & Tegenungan Waterfall
Tegalalang Rice Terraces & Sacred Monkey Forest

itinerary.title: Bali Ubud Love Escape
itinerary.tagline: Ubud — The Heart of Romantic Bali
itinerary.overview: Escape to the serene landscapes of Ubud with this TRAGUIN curated honeymoon experience. Luxury stays nestled in lush tropical jungles provide a tranquil and romantic setting for your premium Bali holiday — from private villa experiences to intimate cultural tours.
itinerary.seo_title: ID-002 | Bali Ubud Love Escape | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Ubud honeymoon (ID-002): luxury villa, rice terraces, couple's spa, cooking class, and Tegenungan Waterfall.

days.title: Arrival in Ubud — A Dreamy Welcome
days.description: Arrive in Bali and take a private transfer to your handpicked hotel in the lush heart of Ubud. Enjoy a relaxing evening with a floral bath and a romantic dinner setup by TRAGUIN experts.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, private transfer to Ubud
Evening Experience: Floral bath and romantic dinner setup

days.title: Ubud — Nature's Embrace
days.description: Explore the iconic Tegalalang Rice Terraces and the Sacred Monkey Forest. Experience scenic beauty and take photos at the most popular Instagram spots in Ubud.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Tegalalang Rice Terraces, Sacred Monkey Forest

days.title: Ubud — Wellness & Relaxation
days.description: Indulge in a couple's spa retreat with a traditional Balinese massage in a jungle-view setting. Spend the evening at a boutique cafe in downtown Ubud.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Couple's spa retreat, traditional Balinese massage

days.title: Ubud — Cultural Exploration
days.description: Visit the Ubud Art Market for local souvenirs. Participate in a private cooking class to learn the flavors of Bali.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Ubud Art Market, private Balinese cooking class

days.title: Ubud — Waterfall Adventure
days.description: Discover the hidden gems of Ubud, including the stunning Tegenungan Waterfall. Enjoy a final romantic evening with a private dinner under the stars.
activities: Evening Experience: Private dinner under the stars

days.title: Farewell Bali
days.description: Enjoy a leisurely breakfast before your private transfer to the airport. TRAGUIN ensures a seamless end to your perfect Ubud Love Escape.

inclusions.text: 05 Nights luxury villa accommodation in Ubud
All taxes and service charges included
International airfare and Indonesia visa on arrival fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
